final:
module sram_cell (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input write_enable,
    input read_enable,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] obf_memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            obf_memory <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= obf_memory; // Read data from obf_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
